Check_In_Date.title: Check_In_Date
Check_In_Date.description: This is the check-in date for the reservation. If a relative date is provided, calculate it and use that. If one isn't provided ask for it.

Check_Out_Date.title: Check_Out_Date
Check_Out_Date.description: This is the check-out date for the reservation.  If a relative date is provided, calculate it and use that. If one isn't provided ask for it.

Contact_Id.title: Contact_Id
Contact_Id.description: This is the contact id of the person making the reservation. If a contact isn't specified ask for a contact.

Num_of_Guests.title: Num_of_Guests
Num_of_Guests.description: The number of people staying for this reservation. If this isn't ask for it.

Room_Name.title: Room_Name
Room_Name.description: This is the name of the room including the number that is available. Provide a list of available rooms based on the type of room.

Room_Type.title: Room_Type
Room_Type.description: The type of room the person making the reservation would like. If a type isn't provided, use the type associated to the room number they are trying to book, or provide a list of available types and ask them to choose one.

Status.title: Status
Status.description: This is the status of the reservation. Set this to Confirmed unless another status is selected.
